title: cleyera japonica var. tonkinensis
intro: Cleyera japonica var. tonkinensis, also known as Tonkin Cleyera or Japanese Cleyera, is a species of flowering plant in the family Theaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in Asian medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Cleyera japonica var. tonkinensis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support immune function. The plant is typically prepared as a tea or infused in hot water to be used for medicinal purposes, and it is also used in some herbal supplements.
